paper_title: Tracking Maize Pollen Development by the Leaf Collar Method

methods.method_name: Leaf Collar Method for Vegetative Staging
methods.description: The Leaf Collar Method is used to determine the vegetative (V) stages of maize plants by counting the number of leaves with visible collars. This method helps in identifying the developmental stages of the plant, which is crucial for accurate staging and monitoring of pollen development.

steps.description: Determine vegetative (V) stages by counting the total number of leaves with visible collars.
steps.searchable_summary: count leaves with visible collars to determine V-stages

steps.description: Exclude leaves within the whorl that are not fully expanded and have no visible leaf collar.
steps.searchable_summary: exclude non-expanded leaves without visible collars

steps.description: Dissect plants after reaching selected V-stages to monitor pollen development.
steps.searchable_summary: dissect plants to monitor pollen development

methods.method_name: Correlation of Plant Height and Vegetative Stages
methods.description: This method investigates the correlation between plant height and vegetative stages to determine the accuracy of using plant height as an indicator for V-stages and pollen development.

steps.description: Study plant height to establish a correlation with vegetative stages and pollen development.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze plant height correlation with V-stages

steps.description: Compare plants at the same day after planting to assess accuracy of V-stage prediction.
steps.searchable_summary: validate V-stage prediction accuracy by comparing same-day plants

methods.description: This method tracks maize pollen developmental stages using the Leaf Collar Method by measuring anther and tassel size, and correlating these measurements with pollen development stages.

steps.description: Measure anthers and tassel size in correlation with pollen developmental stages.
steps.searchable_summary: measure anther and tassel size for pollen stage correlation

steps.description: Analyze correlation between anther/tassel size and pollen development.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze correlation between size and pollen development

steps.description: Dissect maize plants to identify developmental stages of anthers and tassels.
steps.searchable_summary: dissect plants to identify anther and tassel stages
